findings.title: Command audit artifact was missing after migration
findings.detail: The migration script's conflict resolution removed the pre-created command-audit.md when re-migrating the 020 directory.
findings.notes: Fixed: recreated command-audit.md with full audit results.

findings.title: Some commands reference spec.md/plan.md instead of proposal.md/design.md
findings.detail: Post-migration, speckit still creates spec.md and plan.md as working files. Only migrated historical records use proposal.md/design.md. This is by design per FR-004.
findings.suggested_resolution: No action needed — speckit's working file naming is independent of OpenSpec naming for migrated records.
findings.notes: By design: speckit creates spec.md/plan.md as working files. FR-004 renames to proposal.md/design.md only for historical migration.
